scripts.api:generate: go run github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@v1.16.6 init --generalInfo swagger.go --dir ../agentcli --output static/openapi --outputTypes json,yaml --parseDependency
scripts.api:render: redocly build-docs harness-agent@v1 --output static/redoc/index.html --title 'Harness Agent HTTP API' --template redoc-template.hbs
scripts.api:docs: npm run api:generate && npm run api:lint && npm run api:render
